headline: London swamped by self-storage units as housing shortage grows
summary: Self-storage units are springing up across London at a record rate as the city’s housing shortage becomes more acute.

raw.headline: London swamped by self-storage units as housing shortage grows

headline: Cushman & Wakefield Announces Two Senior Hires in New Jersey to Strengthen Global Portfolio Solutions Offering
summary: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J., April 02, 2026--Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) announced the addition of Nick Hilton as Executive Managing Director and Brendan McBride as Executive Director.

headline: Strategic decarbonization can aid green goals while improving maintenance

headline: This Real Estate Pro Likes Fannie Mae, CBRE Group, U-Haul, and Other Housing Plays
